$comment: Deployment config for the live note-extraction executor. The boot composition reads this to build rollout.liveAgent: it runs the declared agent.note_extractor through the REAL runAgent path (usage/cost journaled) with the specified backend+model, native strict structured output over the schema_file, and the prompt_file composed with the YAML's declared extraction_constraints. Paths are relative to this file's directory. Prompt+schema live here (runtime-side) because prompt text is banned from the executable acme-notes.product.yaml graph.
